name: Silver Bullet Mines Corp.
description: Silver Bullet Mines Corp. is a junior mineral exploration and development company focused on the acquisition and extraction of natural resources, primarily silver, gold, and copper. The company operates projects across the western United States, including key assets in Arizona, Idaho, and Nevada. Headquartered in Burlington, Ontario, Silver Bullet Mines Corp. is publicly traded on the TSX Venture Exchange under the ticker symbol SBMI. The company is dedicated to advancing its mining properties toward production, leveraging its technical expertise to identify and develop high-potential mineral deposits within its portfolio.
